calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2020 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rubi Huey (Petitioner).

The Court noted that the Parties have an official record of marriage, questions whether they have had any issues with anybody recognizing the marriage, stated that this is done when a marriage has occurred and the Parties are unable to obtain an official record of it, and questions why this is here. Ms. Huey stated that she is looking to have the marriage registered in California, that they have only been married one month and that they have not had any problems with anyone. The Court stated that they have an official record of the marriage in Paris and that it does not see why it wouldn't be recognized. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is denied without prejudice.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
